nav.logoutConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to log out?

auth.openBotInApp: Open the bot in the app
auth.emailVerifiedOk: Email verified. Sign in with your password.
auth.googleLinkPending: This Google account matches an existing cabinet email. We sent a message to {{email}} — open the link there to finish Google sign-in, or sign in with your password below.
auth.telegramWidgetLoadError: Could not load the Telegram widget

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to activate your account.
verifyEmail.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Request a new code or try again.
verifyEmail.checkSpam: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.resendNeedEmail: Open this page from the registration or link-email flow so we know which address to resend to.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: Check your inbox — we sent a reset link.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.telegramAlreadyLinked: This Telegram is already linked to another cabinet account. Sign in to that account or contact support.
errors.deleteAccountFailed: Could not delete the account. Please try again later.
errors.deleteAccountConfirmMismatch: Type DELETE in uppercase Latin letters.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.trialSubtitle: Try our VPN for free - no commitments
dashboard.subscriptionExpiredDateHint: Your subscription period has ended. Renew to restore access.
dashboard.subscriptionExpiredTrafficHint: Your traffic limit is exhausted. Renew to continue using the service.

subscriptionPage.title: Subscription
subscriptionPage.emptySubtitle: You don't have any active subscriptions yet
subscriptionPage.expiredDateHint: The subscription period has ended. A new paid period is required to continue.
subscriptionPage.expiredTrafficHint: The traffic limit is exhausted. Renew the subscription to continue.
subscriptionPage.devicesUnavailable: Device management is unavailable for this subscription type.
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesDecreaseHint: You can lower the limit down to your plan minimum
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesNoActions: No device limit actions available right now.
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesDecreaseNote: The new limit applies immediately. No refund for already paid extra slots.
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesDecreaseModalIntro: You are about to reduce the number of paid extra device slots on your subscription.
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesDecreaseModalNoRefund: Once you confirm, the change takes effect immediately. There is no proration or refund for the current billing period.
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesDecreaseModalIrreversible: This action cannot be undone after it is applied.
subscriptionPage.extraDevicesDecreaseModalEnsure: Please make sure you want to continue.

accounts.title: Linked accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage how you sign in to the cabinet
accounts.loginMethodsHint: Email, Google, and Telegram — link or unlink providers.
accounts.mergeHint: If Telegram was already used in the bot on another profile, you will see the account merge screen after linking.
accounts.linkEmailPageSubtitle: Set an email and password to sign in without Telegram or Google. We will send a confirmation message to your inbox.
accounts.emailInUseHint: This email is already registered to another cabinet account. Log in to that account and use «Linked accounts» / Telegram merge if you need to combine profiles, or choose a different address.
accounts.emailUsedBySocial: This email is already used by another sign-in method. Please use a different email.
accounts.linkErrorSocialOccupiedGoogle: This Google account is already linked to another cabinet profile.
accounts.linkErrorSocialOccupiedTelegram: This Telegram account is already linked to another cabinet profile.
accounts.linkErrorSocialOccupiedGeneric: This social account is already linked to another cabinet profile.
accounts.linkErrorProviderDisabled: The selected sign-in method is currently unavailable.
accounts.linkErrorStateInvalid: The linking session has expired. Please try linking again.
accounts.linkErrorGeneric: Could not link the account. Please try again.
accounts.unlinkLastMethod: You cannot remove the only way to sign in.
accounts.unlinkTelegramForbidden: Telegram cannot be unlinked from the cabinet once linked.
accounts.emailManagedByGoogle: Email is managed by Google sign-in

step1.title: Welcome!
step1.body: This is your personal account area. Here you can manage your subscription, pay for plans, and connect your devices.

step2.title: Connect your devices
step2.body: Tap this button to open step-by-step instructions for connecting VPN on your devices.

step3.title: Add backup sign-in methods
step3.body: To avoid losing access to your account, link Telegram and at least one additional sign-in method in the “Profile” section.

supportPage.infoSectionSubtitle: FAQ, legal documents, service status, and useful links.

supportChat.title: Support
supportChat.emptyHint: Describe your issue — we will reply here in the cabinet.
supportChat.sendError: Could not send. Please try again.
supportChat.ticketClosed: This ticket is closed. A new message will open a new ticket.

profile.title: Profile
profile.promocodesCardHint: Activate codes and view activation history
profile.telegramIdUnlinkedHint: Shown after you link Telegram under «Linked accounts».
profile.linkedAccountsHint: Manage how you sign in to the cabinet
profile.referralFootnote: When a friend signs up and pays using your link, bonuses follow the same rules as in the bot.
profile.referralNeedTelegram: Link Telegram under «Linked accounts» to get a referral link for web sign-up.

connections.title: Connect a device
connections.subtitle: Open your Remnawave subscription page and follow the in-app guide.
connections.step1: Copy the subscription link on the Subscription page if needed.
connections.step2: Use the button below — it opens the subscription web UI with the guide.
connections.step3: Install the app and import the subscription as shown on screen.
connections.noLink: No subscription link yet. Buy a plan or activate a trial.
connections.deepLinkIntro: Use the button below or wait for the automatic redirect.
connections.deepLinkInvalidHint: This URL cannot be opened safely. Go back to the guide and try again.

support.title: Support
support.intro: Bot, support, and channel URLs come from the same environment variables as the Telegram bot.
support.empty: No links are configured yet (BOT_URL, SUPPORT_URL, etc.). Try the bot if you have it.

info.title: Information
info.intro: Legal documents and resources from your service configuration.
info.empty: No links configured for this section. Check Support.

fortune.title: Fortune wheel
fortune.subtitle_one: One spin costs one subscription day.
fortune.moduleOff: The fortune wheel is disabled on this server.
fortune.noPanel: Remnawave panel is not configured — spins are unavailable.
fortune.statsCompactAria: Paid spins left today (UTC) and subscription days remaining
fortune.paidSpinsLeftHint: Paid spins remaining today (UTC day; free daily spin does not count)
fortune.subscriptionDaysHint: Subscription buffer in days (from remaining time)

reason.module_disabled: The wheel module is turned off.
reason.no_paid: At least one paid subscription purchase is required (trials do not count).
reason.insufficient_days: Not enough subscription time left for a spin.
reason.not_configured: The wheel is not configured on the server.
reason.unknown: Spin is not available right now.

fortune.winnerFeedEmpty: No wins to show yet — be the first to spin.

loyaltyPage.title: Loyalty
loyaltyPage.subtitle: Points for payments, tiers and discounts — same as in the Telegram bot.
loyaltyPage.disabled: Loyalty program is disabled on this server.
loyaltyPage.noBonusYet: No loyalty discount yet — earn points until the first tier with a discount (from {{xp}} XP).
loyaltyPage.maxLevel: You are at the top loyalty tier.
loyaltyPage.howBullet3: Higher tier — bigger discount on future payments.
loyaltyPage.howBullet4: The discount applies from the next payment (based on XP you already have).

referralPage.title: Referral program
referralPage.intro: Invite friends with your link — rewards follow the same rules as in the bot.
referralPage.progressiveHint: Progressive mode is on: the reward depends on how many people you invite.
referralPage.noLinks: Links are unavailable. Check bot settings and the cabinet public URL.
referralPage.defaultDaysHint: By default, {{n}} day(s) are credited when a referral pays.
referralPage.howDefault: For the first successful subscription payment via your referral link you receive <0>+{{n}} days</0> (same as in the bot).
referralPage.howProgressiveIntro: Progressive mode (same as in the bot):
referralPage.howProgressiveFirst: First referral payment: you get <0>+{{ref}} days</0>, your invitee <1>+{{referee}} days</1>.
referralPage.howProgressiveNext: Each later subscription payment by the referral: you get <0>+{{n}} days</0>.
referralPage.howLinksHint: Share the bot link or the cabinet sign-up link — both are tied to your account.
referralPage.shareInviteText: Join VPN MEOWS using my link and get bonus days after registration 🔥

promocodes.title: Promo codes
promocodes.subtitle: Apply promo codes created by admins in the Telegram side.
promocodes.noPending: No active pending discount right now.
promocodes.pendingDiscount: Discount {{pct}}% will be applied to your next payment.
promocodes.untilFirstPurchase: Valid until the first paid subscription purchase.
promocodes.info1: Cabinet supports all admin-created promo types (subscription days, trial, extra device, discount).
promocodes.info2: first purchase / tariff / max uses / validity limits are enforced exactly like in the bot.
promocodes.info3: Promo discounts are combined with loyalty and capped by server total-discount limit.

success.trial_skipped: Trial promo was redeemed, but you already have an active subscription.

errors.already_used: This promo code has already been used on your account.
errors.inactive: Promo code is inactive, expired, or max uses reached.
errors.pending_discount: You already have an active pending discount from another promo.
errors.tariff_mismatch: Promo code does not match your current tariff.

tariffs.title: Plans
tariffs.subtitle: Choose the right plan for you

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site and try again.
checkout.earlyDowngradeHint: Early switch to a cheaper plan: remaining time is converted using the same rules as in the bot.
checkout.earlyUpgradeHint: Switch to a more expensive plan: remaining time is recalculated, and the resulting period on the new plan follows the same rules as in the bot.
checkout.switchTitle: How your new term is calculated
checkout.switchTotal: Total days on the new plan
checkout.previewError: Could not recalculate the amount. Showing catalog price — you will be charged the actual total at checkout.
checkout.extraHwidRenewHint: You have {{n}} active extra devices. Renew them with this subscription payment?

paymentStatus.title: Payment
paymentStatus.pendingHint: This usually takes just a few seconds.
paymentStatus.successHintExtraHwid: Your device limit has been increased.
paymentStatus.failedHint: Please try again or choose a different payment method.

password.title: Password
password.noPasswordHint: You sign in without a password (Google/Telegram). Password change is unavailable.

google.title: Google
google.linkHint: You will be redirected to Google sign-in.
google.disabled: Google OAuth is not configured on the server.
google.linkStartError: Could not start linking. Sign out and sign in again.

yandex.disabled: Yandex OAuth is not configured on the server.
yandex.linkStartError: Could not start Yandex linking. Sign out and sign in again.

vk.disabled: VK OAuth is not configured on the server.
vk.linkStartError: Could not start VK linking. Sign out and sign in again.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.linkedDescription: This Telegram account is already linked to your cabinet profile.
telegram.alreadyLinked: This Telegram is already linked to another account.
telegram.linkHint: Confirm Telegram login using the button below.
telegram.devUnlink: Remove Telegram login link (dev server only)
telegram.devUnlinkHint: Removes cabinet Telegram login and resets the linked customer telegram_id to the web placeholder so you can use the link widget again. Subscription dates and VPN link are not changed.
telegram.devUnlinkDone: Telegram login identity removed. Refresh the page.
telegram.linkStartError: Could not start linking. Sign out and sign in again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your cabinet account and sign-in data.
deleteAccount.warning: This cannot be undone. Your cabinet account will be removed. If you only had a web-only bot profile, that profile and purchase history in the bot will be deleted. Payments are not refunded.
deleteAccount.confirmHint: To confirm, type DELETE in uppercase in the field below.

merge.title: Merge accounts
merge.subtitle: You already have data from the bot. Review what will change after merging.
merge.mergeIntro: This sign-in method is already tied to another bot account. You can merge the two cabinet accounts into one.
merge.resultDropSubscription: The unselected subscription will be removed (from the database and Remnawave panel)
merge.resultMethods: All sign-in methods will be merged
merge.resultDays: Subscription period (from the profile you keep)
merge.noop: No merge needed — data is already aligned.
merge.dangerous: Warning: subscription conflict. Merge may affect your VPN subscription link.
merge.needChoice: Pick which subscription to keep, then confirm the merge.
merge.claimMissing: Merge session expired. Start linking again.

pwa.installHint: Add cabinet to your home screen for quick access.
pwa.iosHint: In Safari tap Share -> Add to Home Screen.

errors.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.conflict: Operation already running or data conflict.
errors.notImplemented: This feature is not available in web admin yet.
errors.panelUnavailable: Remnawave is not configured or panel is unavailable.
errors.broadcastInProgress: A broadcast is already running. Please wait until it finishes.
errors.recalcInProgress: XP recalc is already in progress.
errors.promoCodeRequired: Promo code and type are required.

dashboard.title: Admin panel
dashboard.subtitle: Service management
dashboard.placeholder: Sections will appear as they are implemented. Use the navigation above.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: Service metrics overview
stats.salesTrendHint: Select a longer period to see the sales chart
stats.fortuneExpandHint: Tap to show stats for today, this month, and all time

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Customer management
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the user.
users.deleteWarning: Delete user {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.totalLimitHint: How many devices can be connected at once.
subscription.extraHwidHint: Slots above the tariff base limit. Changing these recalculates the panel limit automatically.
subscription.extraHwidInactive: {{count}} slot(s) in DB but expired — not counted in limit

tariffs.title: Tariffs
tariffs.subtitle: Plans, limits and pricing
tariffs.name: Name
tariffs.pricesHint: Subscription price per billing period. Leave Stars empty if you only accept rubles.
tariffs.descriptionHint: Telegram HTML markup (same as in the bot): links, italic, blockquotes. Preview on the right shows how users see it in the cabinet.
tariffs.descriptionPreviewEmpty: Preview appears when you enter a description

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.subtitle: Tiers and XP recalculation
loyalty.recalcConfirm: Recalculate XP for all users? This may take a while.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.subtitle: Mass messaging via Telegram
broadcast.photoAttached: Photo will be sent via Telegram
broadcast.buttonsHint: Same as TG admin: each recipient sees buttons in their language.
broadcast.previewButtonsHint: Button labels are shown in your UI language; recipients see their own language.
broadcast.confirmMessage: Audience: {{audience}}. Recipients: {{count}}. Buttons: {{buttons}}. The message goes via Telegram — web-only users are skipped.
broadcast.started: Broadcast started for {{count}} recipients. Stats will arrive in the admin Telegram chat.
broadcast.alreadyInProgress: A broadcast is already running. Please wait until it finishes.

sync.title: Synchronization
sync.subtitle: Import users from Remnawave panel
sync.description: Sync imports users from the Remnawave panel into the local database. New users will be created, existing ones updated.
sync.note: Synchronization runs in the background. Results will appear in server logs.
